notes: MongoDB uses BSON (Binary JSON) for storage. These types are used in $type operators, JSON Schema validation ($jsonSchema), and aggregation expressions.

types.name: string
types.description: UTF-8 string. Most common type for text data. BSON type 2.

types.name: symbol
types.description: Deprecated. Identical to string but intended for languages using a symbol data type.

types.name: int
types.description: 32-bit signed integer. BSON type 16. Range: -2147483648 to 2147483647.

types.name: double
types.description: 64-bit IEEE 754 floating-point. BSON type 1. Default numeric type in BSON.

types.name: decimal
types.description: 128-bit decimal floating-point (Decimal128). BSON type 19. Used for precise monetary calculations.

types.name: bool
types.description: Boolean true or false. BSON type 8.

types.name: date
types.description: UTC datetime stored as 64-bit integer (milliseconds since Unix epoch). BSON type 9.

types.name: timestamp
types.description: Internal MongoDB type for replication. 64-bit: 32-bit seconds + 32-bit ordinal. Not the same as date. BSON type 17.
types.notes: Use 'date' for application timestamps; 'timestamp' is for MongoDB internal use.

types.name: objectId
types.description: 12-byte BSON ObjectId. Encodes creation time (4 bytes), machine id (5 bytes), process counter (3 bytes). BSON type 7.

types.name: binData
types.description: Binary data with a subtype byte. BSON type 5. Used for files, UUIDs, MD5 hashes, and custom binary.

types.name: array
types.description: Ordered list of BSON values. BSON type 4. Elements can be of mixed types.

types.name: null
types.description: Null value or a missing field. BSON type 10.

types.name: regex
types.description: Regular expression with options. BSON type 11.

types.name: javascript
types.description: JavaScript code. BSON type 13. Used in system.js or map-reduce (deprecated in favor of aggregation pipeline).

types.name: minKey
types.description: Internal type. Compares lower than all BSON elements. BSON type -1. Used for range queries.

types.name: maxKey
types.description: Internal type. Compares higher than all BSON elements. BSON type 127. Used for range queries.
